allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Restructure hologram-onnx: 5 crates → 1 root crate

Major restructuring to migrate from old hologram-compiler API to new
hologram-ir architecture. Project now compiles successfully as a single
root crate with functionality stubbed for incremental implementation.

## Changes

### Structure
- Consolidated 5 crates \(spec, core, ops, cli, config\) into single root crate
- Organized code into src/{core,ops,cli,config} subdirectories
- Removed workspace configuration from Cargo.toml
- Deleted old crates/ directory

### Dependencies
- Added hologram-ir for new IR system
- Added hologram-compiler for compilation passes
- Consolidated all dependencies into single Cargo.toml
- Added rkyv for serialization

### API Migration
- Updated all imports from hologram_onnx_* to crate::*
- Changed hologram_onnx_spec::* to crate::proto::*
- Fixed internal module references

### Stubbed for Implementation
- All 80+ ONNX operation translators \(src/ops/\)
- Execution runtime \(src/cli/run.rs\)
- Some CLI functionality \(compile, info\)
- Serialization module \(will use hologram-ir serialization\)
- Tests updated to use new API \(some ignored pending reimplementation\)

### Build Status
✅ Compiles successfully with zero errors
⚠️  10 warnings \(expected for stubbed code\)

## Next Steps
- Implement all stubbed ONNX operation translators
- Implement full ONNX→IR translation pipeline
- Implement weight serialization
- Add comprehensive test coverage
- Restore all functionality

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(hologram-ai-onnx\): add LayerNorm scale/bias support and BERT tests

- Fix LayerNormTranslator to apply scale \(gamma\) and bias \(beta\) if provided
- Add BERT compilation and runtime execution tests
- Add BERT mask prediction decode test with vocabulary support
- Update shapes module for improved dynamic dimension handling

The LayerNorm translator now properly handles the optional scale and bias
inputs per the ONNX specification, multiplying the normalized output by
scale and adding bias when provided.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
docs: add plan 26 for trait-based embeddable sections

Add design specification for single-file model distribution with
embedded auxiliary data \(vocabulary, configs, tokenizer settings\).

Key features:
- EmbeddableSection trait for extensible section types
- FromEmbeddedSection trait for deserialization
- Built-in section types for common AI model files
- V2 bundle header format with sections table
- Backward compatible with V1 bundles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(hologram-ai-onnx\): implement trait-based embeddable sections \(Plan 26\)

Enable single-file model distribution by embedding auxiliary data
\(vocabulary, configs, preprocessor settings\) in .holo bundles using
a trait-based extensible system.

Key changes:
- Add sections module with EmbeddableSection/FromEmbeddedSection traits
- Implement built-in sections: Vocabulary, TokenizerConfig, ModelConfig,
  SpecialTokens, GenerationConfig, PreprocessorConfig, SentencePiece, Raw
- Add V2 bundle header \(80 bytes\) with sections table support
- Update UnifiedBundleWriter with add_raw_section\(\), finish_v1/v2\(\)
- Add SectionType and EmbeddedFileConfig to OnnxConfig
- Update compile_to_bundle\(\) to load and embed sections from config
- Add comprehensive tests for V2 headers, section tables, and bundles
- Maintain backward compatibility \(produces V1 when no sections added\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
